title: ZKPAuthorizationRequest
description: Schema for the custom zkp_request parameter in CAP authorization requests

circuit_id.description: Identifier of the target ZK circuit to use for proving (e.g. range_proof_date)

assertion.description: The logic statement or constraint to prove about the user attribute

claim.description: The target user context claim (e.g. date_of_birth, country, email_domain)

value.description: The public value or values to compare the user attribute against

nonce.description: A random client-side nonce to protect against proof replay attacks
